title: Abbott probes two cyber incidents amid extortion claims
description: Abbott Laboratories is investigating two separate cybersecurity incidents after confirming unauthorized access to internal legacy Exact Sciences systems in its Cancer Diagnostics business, while also investigating a separate claim that attackers breached its LabCentral portal and stole company data. [...]
author: Lawrence Abrams

title: HollowByte DDoS flaw bloats OpenSSL server memory with 11-byte payload
description: A vulnerability dubbed HollowByte allows unauthenticated attackers to trigger a denial-of-service (DoS) condition on OpenSSL servers with a malicious payload of just 11 bytes. [...]
author: Bill Toulas

title: Ernst & Young discloses data breach after support system hack
description: Ernst & Young is notifying customers of a data breach caused by the compromise of a third-party support ticket system used by its IT personnel. [...]
author: Bill Toulas

title: Inside the Search for "Clean" Residential Proxies for Carding
description: Residential proxies are no longer the silver bullet they once were for carding. Flare explains why cybercriminals increasingly seek "clean" residential proxies and combine them with browser fingerprints, device profiles, and other identity signals to evade modern fraud detection. [...]
author: Sponsored by Flare

title: New Windows LegacyHive zero-day gives hackers admin privileges
description: A security researcher using the "Nightmare Eclipse" handle has released a Windows zero-day exploit dubbed LegacyHive that allows attackers to escalate privileges on up-to-date Windows systems. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: Windows Server 2022 reach end of mainstream support in 90 days
description: Microsoft announced that Windows Server 2022 will reach the mainstream end date in October 2026, but will switch to extended support and continue receiving security updates for five more years. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan

title: US charges two over laundering $43 million from investment fraud
description: U.S. prosecutors on Thursday charged a New York man and woman for their roles in a large-scale crime ring that laundered money stolen in cyber investment fraud scams. [...]
author: Sergiu Gatlan
